MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Order_Home__dll.AccountId__c AS AccountId__c, 'USD' AS CurrencyCode__c, count(Order_Home__dll.Id__c) AS OrderCount__c, sum(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Order_Home__dll.TotalAmount__c, 'USD', 'USD')) AS LifetimeValue__c, avg(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Order_Home__dll.TotalAmount__c, 'USD', 'USD')) AS AvgOrderValue__c, min(Order_Home__dll.EffectiveDate__c) AS FirstOrderDate__c, max(Order_Home__dll.EffectiveDate__c) AS LastOrderDate__c FROM Order_Home__dll GROUP BY Order_Home__dll.AccountId__c, 'USD'
